description_long: This is a rectangular wooden drawer box with a broad, flat top and slightly beveled edges. The front face features two small metal ring handles and a central round knob, suggesting it can be pulled open. The wood has a warm, medium-brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a classic, sturdy appearance. The sides and back are plain, with the back showing two small metal hinge plates, indicating the lid may be hinged. The base is slightly wider than the main body, forming a subtle plinth. This object would be suitable for use as a storage drawer or chest in an urban environment, such as a garage, workshop, or public park.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden drawer box with metal ring handles and a central knob, finished in warm brown wood. The design is classic and functional, with a broad flat top and subtle base plinth.
description_view_0: Front view showing two metal ring handles and a central round knob on the drawer face.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wooden side and the overhanging top and base.
description_view_2: Rear view with two small metal hinge plates visible on the back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden side.
